statement: ISM-1730 already mandates SBOMs and ACSC provides the requirement; SBOM generation is commodity (syft/CycloneDX), so 'we emit a CycloneDX SBOM' is meeting a baseline obligation with off-the-shelf tooling, not a differentiator.

evidence.quote: ISM-1730 requires a software bill of materials be produced and made available to consumers.
pinned dependencies with cryptographic hashes... Dependabot scanning.

falsifier: Show that no existing SBOM tool models the agent-artefact dependency graph (skill->@ref->imported skill->declared MCP/npm/pip dep) and that agent-enterprise's SBOM captures injection-relevant provenance (trust labels, capability surface) a stock syft SBOM omits.
